title: pilosella karpinskyana
intro: Pilosella karpinskyana, also known as the Russian paintbrush, is a rare and highly toxic flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, although its use can be hazardous due to its toxicity. When used under the guidance of a medical professional, Pilosella karpinskyana has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of certain respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Pilosella karpinskyana are typically made from the plant's aerial parts and can be found in some traditional medicine formulas, but their use requires utmost caution and expertise.
